title: critesion jubatum subsp. breviaristatum
intro: Critesion jubatum subsp. breviaristatum, also known as a subspecies of the Squirrel-tail grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Critesion jubatum subsp. breviaristatum include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
